ranked_movies.title: The Princess Bride
ranked_movies.reason: Consistently recommended across multiple threads as a delightful, heartwarming, and classic romance-comedy-adventure that appeals to a wide audience.

ranked_movies.title: Notting Hill
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently mentioned as a top-tier romance with a yearning male lead, cited for its charm and as a prime example of the genre.

ranked_movies.title: While You Were Sleeping
ranked_movies.reason: Highly recommended in multiple requests for sweet, fluffy romances, praised for its cozy and heartwarming story.

ranked_movies.title: The Holiday
ranked_movies.reason: Often suggested as a feel-good, cozy romance movie perfect for a lighthearted watch.

ranked_movies.title: Pride and Prejudice
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended multiple times for its portrayal of a yearning male lead (Mr. Darcy) and its status as a classic romance, with both the 1995 and 2005 versions mentioned.

ranked_movies.title: Stardust
ranked_movies.reason: Suggested as a fantastic blend of romance, comedy, and fantasy that provides a warm, cozy feeling.

ranked_movies.title: 10 Things I Hate About You
ranked_movies.reason: A frequently cited classic rom-com that is consistently recommended for its fun story and great chemistry.

ranked_movies.title: Serendipity
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended in threads about yearning and gentle male leads, noted for its romantic and fate-driven plot.

ranked_movies.title: 13 Going on 30
ranked_movies.reason: Listed as a personal favorite and a top rom-com in multiple requests for lighthearted, fun movies.

ranked_movies.title: You've Got Mail
ranked_movies.reason: A classic Nora Ephron rom-com that is repeatedly suggested for its comforting and nostalgic feel.

ranked_movies.title: About Time
ranked_movies.reason: Mentioned in discussions about romance movies written by men and also recommended as a sweet, thoughtful romantic film.

ranked_movies.title: Amelie
ranked_movies.reason: Highly recommended in the foreign film thread, praised for its creativity, quirkiness, and beautiful cinematography.

ranked_movies.title: Four Weddings and a Funeral
ranked_movies.reason: Cited as an example of a romance movie written by a man and also recommended as a classic British rom-com.

ranked_movies.title: Kate & Leopold
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended for its portrayal of a yearning gentleman (Hugh Jackman) and noted for its quotable lines and charm.

ranked_movies.title: The Proposal
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently listed alongside other top rom-coms for its fun premise and chemistry between Sandra Bullock and Ryan Reynolds.

ranked_movies.title: Ever After
ranked_movies.reason: Suggested as a sweet, fluffy Cinderella-inspired romance that feels like a warm hug.

ranked_movies.title: My Big Fat Greek Wedding
ranked_movies.reason: A commonly recommended rom-com praised for its heartwarming and humorous family dynamics.

ranked_movies.title: Leap Year
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended for its comforting, rainy-day vibe and as a lighthearted travel romance.

ranked_movies.title: When Harry Met Sally
ranked_movies.reason: Cited as a quintessential rom-com written by a woman (Nora Ephron) and a benchmark for the genre.

ranked_movies.title: North & South
ranked_movies.reason: Highly recommended in the yearning thread for its intense and passionate male lead (Richard Armitage), though it is a miniseries, its impact in romance discussions earned it a spot.
